EmailTemplate.description: Email sent to remind the Business Developper that no segmentation is related to the company
EmailTemplate.name: Company - No Segmentation
EmailTemplate.subject: No Segmentation has been created for {!Account.Name}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear user The company {!Account.Name} has been created yesterday. At this time, no segmentation has been created for this company.
Please, remember that it is mandatory to create a segmentation for a company, and that you won't be able to relate contacts to the company until a segmentation is created.
To access the company, please click on the following link : {!Account.Link}
Regards, System Administrator
